scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit
